creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Created attachment 180174
dehydrated 0.4.0 patch

Update the port to the latest version.

Drop the pkg-message warning about the name change. This removes some clutter and we still have an entry in ports/UPDATING.

Changelog: https://github.com/lukas2511/dehydrated/blob/master/CHANGELOG

There should be another ports/UPDATING entry like this:

  AFFECTS: users of security/dehydrated
  AUTHOR: $commiter

  Version 0.4.0 adds new hooks and also new parameters for
  old hooks. Be sure to review your hooks file after
  updating.
